channel.title: PrimitiveKit – Navigation
channel.description: Recent content in Navigation on PrimitiveKit

item.title: Breadcrumb
item.description:
Breadcrumb

Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.

Import 

import { BreadcrumbComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-breadcrumb>Content</pk-breadcrumb>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Breadcrumb component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-breadcrumb [style]="{
 '--breadcrumb-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--breadcrumb-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-breadcrumb>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --breadcrumb-bg-color
  • --breadcrumb-padding-top
  • --breadcrumb-padding-y
  • --breadcrumb-padding-right
  • --breadcrumb-padding-x
  • --breadcrumb-padding-bottom
  • --breadcrumb-padding-left
  • --breadcrumb-gap
  • --breadcrumb-item-color
  • --breadcrumb-item-color-hover
  • … and 34 more

Accessibility

The Breadcrumb component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Link - Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.
  • Pagination - Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Breadcrumb
item.description:
Breadcrumb

Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.

Import 

import { Breadcrumb } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Basic Usage 

<Breadcrumb>Content</Breadcrumb>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Breadcrumb component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Breadcrumb style={{
'--breadcrumb-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--breadcrumb-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Breadcrumb>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --breadcrumb-bg-color
  • --breadcrumb-padding-top
  • --breadcrumb-padding-y
  • --breadcrumb-padding-right
  • --breadcrumb-padding-x
  • --breadcrumb-padding-bottom
  • --breadcrumb-padding-left
  • --breadcrumb-gap
  • --breadcrumb-item-color
  • --breadcrumb-item-color-hover
  • … and 34 more

Accessibility

The Breadcrumb component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Link - Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.
  • Pagination - Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Breadcrumb
item.description:
Breadcrumb

Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.

Import 

import Breadcrumb from '@primitivekit/svelte/Breadcrumb.svelte';

Basic Usage 

<Breadcrumb>Content</Breadcrumb>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Breadcrumb component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Breadcrumb style={{
 '--breadcrumb-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--breadcrumb-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Breadcrumb>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --breadcrumb-bg-color
  • --breadcrumb-padding-top
  • --breadcrumb-padding-y
  • --breadcrumb-padding-right
  • --breadcrumb-padding-x
  • --breadcrumb-padding-bottom
  • --breadcrumb-padding-left
  • --breadcrumb-gap
  • --breadcrumb-item-color
  • --breadcrumb-item-color-hover
  • … and 34 more

Accessibility

The Breadcrumb component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Link - Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.
  • Pagination - Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Breadcrumb
item.description:
Breadcrumb

Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.

Import 

import { Breadcrumb } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const breadcrumb = new Breadcrumb({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(breadcrumb.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Breadcrumb component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const breadcrumb = new Breadcrumb({
 style: {
 '--breadcrumb-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--breadcrumb-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --breadcrumb-bg-color
  • --breadcrumb-padding-top
  • --breadcrumb-padding-y
  • --breadcrumb-padding-right
  • --breadcrumb-padding-x
  • --breadcrumb-padding-bottom
  • --breadcrumb-padding-left
  • --breadcrumb-gap
  • --breadcrumb-item-color
  • --breadcrumb-item-color-hover
  • … and 34 more

Accessibility

The Breadcrumb component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Link - Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.
  • Pagination - Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Breadcrumb
item.description:
Breadcrumb

Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.

Import 

import { Breadcrumb } from '@primitivekit/vue';

Basic Usage 

<Breadcrumb>Content</Breadcrumb>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Breadcrumb component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Breadcrumb style={{
 '--breadcrumb-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--breadcrumb-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Breadcrumb>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --breadcrumb-bg-color
  • --breadcrumb-padding-top
  • --breadcrumb-padding-y
  • --breadcrumb-padding-right
  • --breadcrumb-padding-x
  • --breadcrumb-padding-bottom
  • --breadcrumb-padding-left
  • --breadcrumb-gap
  • --breadcrumb-item-color
  • --breadcrumb-item-color-hover
  • … and 34 more

Accessibility

The Breadcrumb component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Link - Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.
  • Pagination - Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Link
item.description:
Link

Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.

Import 

import { LinkComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-link>Content</pk-link>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Link component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-link [style]="{
 '--link-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--link-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-link>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --link-color
  • --link-color-hover
  • --link-color-active
  • --link-color-visited
  • --link-color-focus
  • --link-bg-color
  • --link-bg-color-hover
  • --link-bg-color-active
  • --link-bg-color-focus
  • --link-font-family
  • … and 89 more

Accessibility

The Link component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Breadcrumb - Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.
  • Pagination - Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Link
item.description:
Link

Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.

Import 

import { Link } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Basic Usage 

<Link>Content</Link>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Link component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Link style={{
'--link-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--link-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Link>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --link-color
  • --link-color-hover
  • --link-color-active
  • --link-color-visited
  • --link-color-focus
  • --link-bg-color
  • --link-bg-color-hover
  • --link-bg-color-active
  • --link-bg-color-focus
  • --link-font-family
  • … and 89 more

Accessibility

The Link component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Breadcrumb - Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.
  • Pagination - Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

item.title: Link
item.description:
Link

Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.

Import 

import Link from '@primitivekit/svelte/Link.svelte';

Basic Usage 

<Link>Content</Link>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Link component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Link style={{
 '--link-bg-color': '#007bff',

  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

item.title: Link
item.description:
Link

Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.

Import 

import { Link } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const link = new Link({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(link.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Link component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const link = new Link({
 style: {
 '--link-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--link-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --link-color
  • --link-color-hover
  • --link-color-active
  • --link-color-visited
  • --link-color-focus
  • --link-bg-color
  • --link-bg-color-hover
  • --link-bg-color-active
  • --link-bg-color-focus
  • --link-font-family
  • … and 89 more

Accessibility

The Link component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Breadcrumb - Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.
  • Pagination - Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

item.description:
Link

Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.

Import 

import { Link } from '@primitivekit/vue';

Basic Usage

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Link component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Link style={{
 '--link-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--link-text-color': '#ffffff'

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --link-color-hover

The Link component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Breadcrumb - Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.

item.title: Menu
item.description:
Menu

Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.

Import 

import { MenuComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-menu>Content</pk-menu>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Menu component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-menu [style]="{
 '--menu-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--menu-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-menu>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --menu-background
  • --menu-border-width
  • --menu-border-style
  • --menu-border-color
  • --menu-border-radius
  • --menu-padding
  • --menu-min-width
  • --menu-item-margin
  • --menu-item-padding
  • --menu-item-height
  • … and 48 more

Accessibility

The Menu component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Link - Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.
  • Breadcrumb - Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.
  • Pagination - Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Menu
item.description:
Menu

Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.

Import 

import { Menu } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Menu component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Menu style={{
'--menu-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--menu-text-color': '#ffffff'

  • --menu-border-radius

  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.
  • Pagination - Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

item.description:
Menu

Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.

item.title: Menu
item.description:
Menu

Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.

Import 

import { Menu } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const menu = new Menu({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(menu.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Menu component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const menu = new Menu({
 style: {
 '--menu-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--menu-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --menu-background
  • --menu-border-width
  • --menu-border-style
  • --menu-border-color
  • --menu-border-radius
  • --menu-padding
  • --menu-min-width
  • --menu-item-margin
  • --menu-item-padding
  • --menu-item-height
  • … and 48 more

Accessibility

The Menu component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Link - Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.
  • Breadcrumb - Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.
  • Pagination - Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Pagination
item.description:
Pagination

Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

Import 

import { PaginationComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-pagination>Content</pk-pagination>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Pagination component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-pagination [style]="{
 '--pagination-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--pagination-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-pagination>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --pagination-display
  • --pagination-align-items
  • --pagination-gap
  • --pagination-padding
  • --pagination-item-min-width
  • --pagination-item-height
  • --pagination-item-padding
  • --pagination-item-font-size
  • --pagination-item-font-weight
  • --pagination-item-line-height
  • … and 56 more

Accessibility

The Pagination component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Link - Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.
  • Breadcrumb - Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Pagination
item.description:
Pagination

Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

Import 

import { Pagination } from '@primitivekit/astro';

The Pagination component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

'--pagination-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--pagination-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Pagination>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --pagination-display
  • --pagination-align-items
  • --pagination-gap
  • --pagination-padding
  • --pagination-item-min-width
  • --pagination-item-height
  • --pagination-item-padding
  • --pagination-item-font-size
  • --pagination-item-font-weight
  • --pagination-item-line-height
  • … and 56 more

Accessibility

The Pagination component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Link - Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.
  • Breadcrumb - Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Pagination
item.description:
Pagination

Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

Import 

import Pagination from '@primitivekit/svelte/Pagination.svelte';

Basic Usage 

<Pagination>Content</Pagination>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Pagination component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Pagination style={{
 '--pagination-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--pagination-text-color': '#ffffff'

  • --pagination-item-height
  • --pagination-item-padding

  • --pagination-item-font-weight
  • --pagination-item-line-height
  • … and 56 more

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Link - Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.
  • Breadcrumb - Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.

  • Customization Guide

item.title: Pagination
item.description:
Pagination

Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

Import 

import { Pagination } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const pagination = new Pagination({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(pagination.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Pagination component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const pagination = new Pagination({
 style: {
 '--pagination-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--pagination-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --pagination-display
  • --pagination-align-items
  • --pagination-gap
  • --pagination-padding
  • --pagination-item-min-width
  • --pagination-item-height
  • --pagination-item-padding
  • --pagination-item-font-size
  • --pagination-item-font-weight
  • --pagination-item-line-height
  • … and 56 more

Accessibility

The Pagination component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Link - Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.
  • Breadcrumb - Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Pagination
item.description:
Pagination

Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

Import 

import { Pagination } from '@primitivekit/vue';

Basic Usage 

<Pagination>Content</Pagination>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Pagination component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Pagination style={{
 '--pagination-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--pagination-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Pagination>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --pagination-display
  • --pagination-align-items
  • --pagination-gap
  • --pagination-padding
  • --pagination-item-min-width
  • --pagination-item-height
  • --pagination-item-padding
  • --pagination-item-font-size
  • --pagination-item-font-weight
  • --pagination-item-line-height
  • … and 56 more

Accessibility

The Pagination component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Link - Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.
  • Breadcrumb - Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.

item.title: Steps
item.description:
Steps

Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.

Import 

import { StepsComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-steps>Content</pk-steps>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Steps component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-steps [style]="{
 '--steps-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--steps-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-steps>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --steps-gap
  • --horizontal
  • --vertical
  • --steps-transition-duration
  • --disabled
  • --steps-icon-size
  • --steps-icon-border-radius
  • --steps-icon-border-width
  • --steps-icon-font-size
  • --wait
  • … and 22 more

Accessibility

The Steps component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Link - Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.
  • Breadcrumb - Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Pagination - Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Steps
item.description:
Steps

Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.

Import 

import { Steps } from '@primitivekit/astro';

Basic Usage 

<Steps>Content</Steps>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Steps component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<Steps style={{
'--steps-bg-color': '#007bff',
'--steps-text-color': '#ffffff'
}}>Custom</Steps>

  • --steps-gap
  • --horizontal
  • --vertical
  • --steps-transition-duration
  • --disabled
  • --steps-icon-size
  • --steps-icon-border-radius
  • --steps-icon-border-width
  • --steps-icon-font-size
  • --wait
  • … and 22 more

Accessibility

The Steps component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Breadcrumb - Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Pagination - Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

item.description:

item.title: Steps
item.description:
Steps

Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.

Import 

import { Steps } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const steps = new Steps({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(steps.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Steps component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const steps = new Steps({
 style: {
 '--steps-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--steps-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --steps-gap
  • --horizontal
  • --vertical
  • --steps-transition-duration
  • --disabled
  • --steps-icon-size
  • --steps-icon-border-radius
  • --steps-icon-border-width
  • --steps-icon-font-size
  • --wait
  • … and 22 more

Accessibility

The Steps component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Link - Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.
  • Breadcrumb - Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.
  • Tabs - Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Pagination - Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

item.title: Tabs
item.description:
Tabs

Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.

Import 

import { TabsComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular';

Basic Usage 

<pk-tabs>Content</pk-tabs>

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Tabs component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

<pk-tabs [style]="{
 '--tabs-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--tabs-text-color': '#ffffff'
}">Custom</pk-tabs>

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --tabs-bg-color
  • --tabs-border-color
  • --tabs-border-width
  • --tabs-border-radius
  • --tabs-padding
  • --tabs-gap
  • --tabs-list-bg-color
  • --tabs-list-border-color
  • --tabs-list-border-width
  • --tabs-list-padding
  • … and 60 more

Accessibility

The Tabs component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:

  • ✅ Semantic HTML elements
  • ✅ Keyboard accessible
  • ✅ Focus visible indicator
  • ✅ Proper ARIA attributes
  • ✅ Screen reader compatible
  • ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum)
  • ✅ Color contrast compliance

Keyboard Navigation

Key Action
Tab Move focus to/from component
Enter Activate component
Space Activate component

Related Components

  • Link - Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles.
  • Breadcrumb - Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure.
  • Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links.
  • Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard.
  • Pagination - Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

See Also

  • Installation Guide
  • Customization Guide
  • Design Tokens Reference
  • Accessibility Guide

item.title: Tabs
item.description:
Tabs

Navigation component for organizing content into multiple panels with tab selection.

Import 

import { Tabs } from '@primitivekit/vanilla';

Basic Usage 

const tabs = new Tabs({ /* options */ });
document.body.appendChild(tabs.element);

Props

No props available.

Customization

The Tabs component supports CSS variables for complete customization:

const tabs = new Tabs({
 style: {
 '--tabs-bg-color': '#007bff',
 '--tabs-text-color': '#ffffff'
 }
});

Design Tokens

The following design tokens are available for customization:

  • --tabs-bg-color
  • --tabs-border-color
  • --tabs-border-width
  • --tabs-border-radius
  • --tabs-padding
  • --tabs-gap
  • --tabs-list-bg-color
  • --tabs-list-border-color
  • --tabs-list-border-width
